
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{"__typename":"Consultancy"},{"__typename":"Cosmo"},{"__typename":"SDK"}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"__typename":"Employee","id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"},"isLeadAvailable":false},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
